svg.title: E-CommerXE backend directory tree
svg.desc: Full file and folder structure of the NestJS backend organised by module
svg.text: auth.service.ts (register, login, MFA, OAuth, tokens, reset)
auth.service.spec.ts (register, login, lockout, MFA, logout, reset)
📁 email/ email.service.ts (verify, lockout, reset, approval templates)
📁 entities/ user.entity.ts (UserRole, AuthProvider, lockout, GDPR fields)
media.service.ts (magic-byte check, Sharp resize, R2 upload, scan queue)
📁 entities/ media-file.entity.ts (variants JSONB, tenant_id, mime enum)
search.service.ts (PG FTS + ts_rank + pg_trgm + Redis cache)
analytics.service.ts (Redis counters, hourly flush, partition cron)
analytics.service.spec.ts (track, IP anonymise, dashboard, flush cron)
📁 filters/ global-exception.filter.ts (PG error codes, no stack in prod)
📁 jobs/ cleanup.jobs.ts (soft-delete purge, GDPR hard-delete, partitions)
